name: Fire Risk - Smoke Prevention
description: Reviews supplied site files for outdoor smoking facilities and non-smoking signage, then returns structured field results.

inputParameters.name: files
inputParameters.description: One or more files to review. Each file is represented as a JSON object containing the original filename, MIME type, and base64-encoded file bytes.

items.description: A file supplied to the skill.

name.description: Original filename, for example site-photo.jpg, report.pdf, or data.json.

mimeType.description: File MIME type, for example image/jpeg, image/png, application/pdf, application/json, text/plain, or application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document.

data.description: Base64-encoded file bytes. Do not include a data URL prefix such as data:image/jpeg;base64,.

outputParameter.name: resultFields
outputParameter.description: Structured result fields returned by the skill.
